\"timeout\",\n133\t    }\n134\t}\n135\t\n136\t/// POST /multi-search — execute multiple searches in a single batch.\n137\t///\n138\t/// Plan §13.11: Reduces round-trips for search UIs that need results + facets\n139\t/// from multiple queries per page render. Each query runs in parallel.\n140\t#[instrument(skip_all, fields(query_count = body.queries.len()))]\n141\tpub async fn multi_search<S>(\n142\t    State(state): State<MultiSearchState>,\n143\t    Json(body): Json<MultiSearchRequest>,\n144\t) -> Result<Json<MultiSearchResponse>, StatusCode>\n145\twhere\n146\t    S: Clone + Send + Sync + 'static,\n147\t    MultiSearchState: FromRef<S>,\n148\t{\n149\t    if !state.config.multi_search.enabled {\n150\t        return Err(StatusCode::NOT_IMPLEMENTED);\n151\t    }\n152\t\n153\t    if body.queries.is_empty() {\n154\t Err(StatusCode::BAD_REQUEST);\n159\t    }\n160\t\n161\t    let executor = MultiSearchExecutor::new(state.config.multi_search.clone());\n162\t\n163\t    // Get topology and policy once for all queries\n164\t    let topology = state.topology.read().await;\n165\t    let policy = match state.config.scatter.unavailable_shard_policy.as_str() {\n166\t        \"partial\" => UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial,\n167\t        \"error\" => UnavailableShardPolicy::Error,\n168\t        \"fallback\" => UnavailableShardPolicy::Fallback,\n169\t        _ => return state.node_master_key.clone(),\n175\t        state.config.scatter.node_timeout_ms,\n176\t    ));\n177\t    let node_client = ProxyNodeClient::new(http_client, state.metrics.clone());\n178\t    let strategy = ScoreMergeStrategy::new();\n179\t\n180\t    // Convert MultiSearchRequest to core MultiSearchRequest\n181\t    // Resolve aliases for each query (plan §13.7)\n182\t    let mut queries_with_resolutions = Vec::new();\n183\t    for mut q in body.queries {\n184\t        // Resolve alias to concrete index UID(s)\n185\t        let (effective_index, resolved_targets) = if state.config.aliases.enabled {\n186\t            let targets = state.alias_registry.resolve(&q.index_uid).await;\n187\t            state.metrics.inc_alias_resolution(&q.index_uid);\n188\t            if targets != vec![q.index_uid.clone()] {\n189\t                // It's an alias\n190\t                (q.index_uid.clone(), targets)\n191\t            } else {\n192\t                // Not an alias\n193\t                (q.index_uid.clone(), vec![q.index_uid.clone()])\n194\t            }\n195\t        } else {\n196\t            (q.index_uid.clone(), vec![q.index_uid.clone()])\n197\t        };\n198\t\n199\t        // For multi-target aliases, we use the first target for the query\n200\t        // (multi-target alias fanout is handled by expanding queries in future)\n201\t        q.index_uid = effective_index;\n202\t\n203\t        let filter_str = q.filter.as_ref()\n204\t            .and_then(|v| if v.is_null() || v.is_string() && v.as_str().map(|s| s.is_empty()).unwrap_or(false) {\n205\t                None\n206\t            } else {\n207\t                serde_json::to_string(v).ok()\n208\t            });\n209\t\n210\t        queries_with_resolutions.push((q, filter_str, resolved_targets));\n211\t    }\n212\t\n213\t    let core_request = miroir_core::multi_search::MultiSearchRequest {\n214\t        queries: queries_with_resolutions.into_iter().map(|(q, filter_str, _resolved_targets)| {\n215\t            miroir_core::multi_search::SearchQuery {\n216\t                indexUid: q.index_uid,\n217\t                q: q.q,\n218\t                filter: filter_str,\n219\t                limit: q.limit,\n220\t                offset: q.offset,\n221\t                other: {\n222\t                    let mut map = std::collections::HashMap::new();\n223\t                    if let Some(sort) = q.sort {\n224\t                        map.insert(\"sort\".to_string(), serde_json::to_value(sort).unwrap());\n225\t                    }\n226\t                    if let Some(facets) = q.facets {\n227\t                        map.insert(\"facets\".to_string(), serde_json::to_value(facets).unwrap());\n228\t                    }\n229\t                    if let Some(ranking_score) = q.ranking_score {\n230\t                        map.insert(\"rankingScore\".to_string(), serde_json::to_value(ranking_score).unwrap());\n231\t                    }\n232\t                    // Add any additional fields from rest\n233\t                    if let Ok(obj) = serde_json::from_value::<std::collections::HashMap<String, Value>>(q.rest) {\n234\t                        for (k, v) in obj {\n235\t                            map.entry(k).or_insert(v);\n236\t                        }\n237\t                    }\n238\t                    map\n239\t                },\n240\t            }\n241\t        }).collect()\n242\t    };\n243\t\n244\t    // Execute multi-search with scatter-gather\n245\t    let response = executor\n246\t        .execute(core_request, move |query| {\n247\t            let topology = topology.clone();\n248\t            let node_client = node_client.clone();\n249\t            let config = state.config.clone();\n250\t            let strategy = strategy.clone();\n251\t            let policy = policy;\n252\t            let replica_selector = state.replica_selector.clone();\n253\t\n254\t            async move {\n255\t                let start = Instant::now();\n256\t\n257\t                // Determine if we should use adaptive selection\n258\t                let use_adaptive = config.replica_selection.strategy == \"adaptive\";\n259\t                let replica_selector_ref = if use_adaptive {\n260\t                    Some(replica_selector.as_ref())\n261\t                } else {\n262\t                    None\n263\t                };\n264\t\n265\t                // Plan usize,\n270\t                    config.shards,\n271\t                    replica_selector_ref,\n272\t                ).await;\n273\t\n274\t                // Build search request\n275\t   index_uid: query.indexUid.clone(),\n279\t                    query: query.q.clone(),\n280\t                    offset: query.offset.unwrap_or(0),\n281\t                    limit: the `dfs_query_then_fetch` pattern:\n151\t/// 1. **Preflight phase**: Send term-frequency query to all shards, aggregate\n152\t///    global document frequencies at the coordinator.\n153\t/// 2. **Search phase**: Send the search query with global IDF attached so that\n154\t///    scoring uses corpus-wide statistics instead of per-shard local IDF.\n155\t///\n156\t/// Returns    headers: HeaderMap,\n167\t    session_id: Option<Extension<SessionId>>,\n168\t    Json(body): Json<SearchRequestBody>,\n169\t) -> Result<Response, StatusCode> {\n170\t    let start = Ok(parsed) => parsed,\n192\t        Err(e) => {\n193\t            warn!(error = %e, \"invalid search_ui.rate_limit.per_ip config, using default\");\n194\t            (60, 60) // Default: 60 requests                        );\n208\t                        return Err(StatusCode::TOO_MANY_REQUESTS);\n209\t                    }\n210\t                    // Allowed, proceed\n211\t                }\n212\t                Err(e) => {\n213\t                    warn!(error = %e, \"failed to check search UI rate limit\");\n214\t                    // Continue anyway on error (fail-open)\n215\t                }\n216\t            }\n217\t        }\n218\t    } else if backend == \"local\" {\n219\t        let (allowed, _wait_seconds) = state.local_search_ui_rate_limiter.check(\n220\t            &source_ip,\n221\t            limit,\n222\t            window_seconds * 1000,\n223\t        );\n224\t        if !allowed {\n225\t            warn!(\n226\t                source_ip_hash = }\n232\t\n233\t    // Resolve alias to concrete index UID (plan §13.7)\n234\t    // Aliases are resolved at routing time; resolved index is used for scatter planning\n235\t    let (effective_index, targets != vec![index.clone()] {\n239\t            // It's an alias\n240\t            (index.clone(), targets)\n241\t        } else {\n242\t            // Not an alias - use index directly\n243\t            (index.clone(), vec![index.clone()])\n244\t        }\n245\t    } else {\n246\t        // Aliases disabled - use index directly\n247\t        (index.clone(), vec![index.clone()])\n248\t    };\n249\t\n250\t    // Session pinning logic (plan §13.6): Check if session has pending write\n251\t    let (pinned_group, strategy_label) = if let Some(ref sid) = sid {\n252\t        if let               let max_wait = state.session_manager.max_wait_duration();\n259\t                    let wait_start = std::time::Instant::now();\n260\t                    match state.session_manager.wait_for_write_completion(\n261\t                        sid,\n262\t                        &state.task_registry,\n263\t                        max_wait,\n264\t                    ).await {\n265\t                        Ok(true) => {\n266\t                            // Write succeeded, clear pin and use normal routing\n267\t                            let wait_duration = wait_start.elapsed().as_secs_f64();\n268\t                            state.metrics.observe_session_wait_duration(wait_duration);\n269\t                            state.metrics.inc_session_pin_enforced(\"block\");\n270\t                            (None, Some(\"block_success\"))\n271\t                        }\n272\t                        Ok(false) => {\n273\t state.metrics.observe_session_wait_duration(wait_duration);\n276\t                            state.metrics.inc_session_wait_timeout(\"block\");\n277\t                            (None, Some(\"block_failed\"))\n278\t                        }\n279\t                        Err(_) => {\n280\t                            // Timeout - still route to pinned group (best effort)\n281\t                            let wait_duration = wait_start.elapsed().as_secs_f64();\n282\t                            state.metrics.observe_session_wait_duration(wait_duration);\n283\t                            state.metrics.inc_session_wait_timeout(\"block\");\n284\t                            (Some(group), Some(\"block_timeout\"))\n285\t                        }\n286\t                    }\n287\t                }\n288\t                WaitStrategy::RoutePin => {\n289\t                    // Route to pinned group without waiting\n290\t                    state.metrics.inc_session_pin_enforced(\"route_pin\");\n291\t                    (Some(group), Some(\"route_pin\"))\n292\t                }\n293\t            }\n294\t        } else {\n295\t            // No pending write - normal routing\n296\t            (None, None)\n297\t        }\n298\t    } else {\n299\t        // No session header - normal routing\n300\t        (None, None)\n301\t    };\n302\t\n303\t    // Log session pinning decision for observability\n304\t    if let Some(label) = strategy_label {\n305\t        debug!(\n306\t            session_id = ?sid,\n307\t            pinned_group = pinned_group,\n308\t            strategy = label,\n309\t            \"session pinning applied\"\n310\t        );\n311\t    }\n312\t\n313\t    // Query coalescing (plan §13.10): Check // Build fingerprint from canonicalized query body + index + settings version\n317\t        let settings_version = state.settings_broadcast.current_version().await;\n318\t        let query_body = }).await;\n335\t\n336\t            match response_bytes {\n337\t                Ok(Ok(response_bytes)) => {\n338\t                    // Received response from coalesced query\n339\t error!(error = %e, \"failed to deserialize coalesced query response\");\n343\t                            return Err(StatusCode::INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR);\n344\t                        }\n345\t                    };\n346\t\n347\t                    // Build response with appropriate headers\n348\t                    let mut response = Response::builder()\n349\t                        .status(StatusCode::OK)\n350\t                        .header(\"content-type\", \"application/json\");\n351\t\n352\t                    // Add settings headers\n353\t                    if }\n356\t                    if settings_version > 0 {\n357\t                        response = response.header(\"X-Miroir-Settings-Version\", settings_version.to_string());\n358\t                    }\n359\t\n360\t                    let response = response\n361\t                        .body(axum::body::Body::from(serde_json::to_string(&response_body).unwrap()))\n362\t                        .unwrap();\n363\t\n364\t                    tracing::info!(\n365\t                        target: \"miroir.search_coalesced\",\n366\t                        index = %effective_index,\n367\t Err(StatusCode::INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR),\n436\t    };\n437\t\n438\t    // Plan scatter using live topology (span for plan construction)\n439\t    let plan = {\n440\t        let _plan_span = tracing::info_span!(\n441\t            \"scatter_plan\",\n442\t            replica_groups = state.config.replica_groups,\n443\t            shards = state.config.shards,\n444\t            rf = state.config.replication_factor,\n445\t            min_settings_version,\n446\t            pinned_group = ?pinned_group,\n447\t            strategy = %state.config.replica_selection.strategy,\n448\t        ).entered();\n449\t\n450\t        // Determine if we should use adaptive selection\n451\t        let use_adaptive = state.config.replica_selection.strategy == \"adaptive\";\n452\t        let replica_selector_ref = if use_adaptive {\n453\t            Some(state.replica_selector.as_ref())\n454\t        } else {\n455\t            None\n456\t        };\n457\t\n458\t        // Session pinning: if pinned_group is set, use group-specific planning\n459\t        if let Some(group) = pinned_group {\n460\t            match plan_search_scatter_for_group(\n461\t                &topo,\n462\t                0,\n463\t                state.config.replication_factor as usize,\n464\t                state.config.shards,\n465\t                group,\n466\t                replica_selector_ref,\n467\t            ).await {\n468\t                Some(p) => p,\n469\t                None => {\n470\t                    // Pinned group not available - fall back to normal planning\n471\t                    // This can happen if the pinned group has failed\n472\t                    warn!(\n473\t                        pinned_group = group,\n474\t                        \"pinned group unavailable, falling back to normal routing\"\n475\t                    );\n476\t                    plan_search_scatter(&topo, 0, state.config.replication_factor as usize, state.config.shards, replica_selector_ref).await\n477\t                }\n478\t            }\n479\t        } else if let Some(floor) = min_settings_version {\n480\t            // If client provided a min settings version floor, use version-filtered planning\n481\t            // Clone the settings broadcast for version checking\n482\t            let settings_broadcast = state.settings_broadcast.clone();\n483\t            let plan_result = plan_search_scatter_with_version_floor(\n484\t                &topo,\n485\t                0,\n486\t                state.config.replication_factor as usize,\n487\t                state.config.shards,\n488\t                &index,\n489\t                floor,\n490\t                &move |idx, node_id| {\n491\t                    // Use a blocking task wrapper since we're in a sync context\n492\t                    let sb = settings_broadcast.clone();\n493\t                    let idx = idx.to_string();\n494\t                    let node_id = node_id.to_string();\n495\t                    tokio::task::block_in_place(|| {\n496\t                        tokio::runtime::Handle::current().block_on(async {\n497\t                            sb.node_version(&idx, &node_id).await\n498\t                        })\n499\t                    })\n500\t                },\n501\t                replica_selector_ref,\n502\t            ).await;\n503\t\n504\t            match plan_result {\n505\t                Some(p) => p,\n506\t                None => {\n507\t                    // No covering set could be assembled after filtering by version floor\n508\t                    let err = MeilisearchError::new(\n509\t                        MiroirCode::SettingsVersionStale,\n510\t                        format!(\n511\t                            \"no covering set available for settings version floor {} on index '{}'\",\n512\t                            floor, index\n513\t                        ),\n514\t                    );\n515\t                    return Err(StatusCode::SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE);\n516\t                }\n517\t            }\n518\t        } else {\n519\t            // No version floor requested, use normal planning\n520\t            plan_search_scatter(&topo, 0, state.config.replication_factor as usize, state.config.shards, replica_selector_ref).await\n521\t        }\n522\t    };\n523\t    let node_count = plan.shard_to_node.len() as u64;\n524\t\n525\t    // Record scatter fan-out size before executing\n526\t    state.metrics.record_scatter_fan_out(node_count);\n527\t\n528\t    // Build search request\n529\t    let search_req = SearchRequest {\n530\t        index_uid: effective_index.clone(),\n531\t        query: body.q,\n532\t        offset: body.offset.unwrap_or(0),\n533\t        limit: body.limit.unwrap_or(20),\n534\t        filter: body.filter,\n535\t        facets: body.facets,\n536\t        ranking_score: client_requested_score,\n537\t        body: body.rest,\n538\t        global_idf: None,\n539\t    };\n540\t\n541\t    // Create node client with the scoped key (or node_master_key as fallback)\n542\t    let http_client = Arc::new(crate::client::HttpClient::new(\n543\t        search_key,\n544\t        state.config.scatter.node_timeout_ms,\n545\t    ));\n546\t    let client = ProxyNodeClient::new(http_client, state.metrics.clone());\n547\t\n548\t    // Use score-based merge strategy (OP#4: requires global IDF)\n549\t    let strategy = ScoreMergeStrategy::new();\n550\t\n551\t    // Register for query coalescing (plan §13.10) - after try_coalesce, before scatter\n552\t    // Only register if coalescing is enabled and this is a single-target query\n553\t    let (tx, fingerprint) = if state.config.query_coalescing.enabled && resolved_targets.len() == 1 {\n554\t        let settings_version = state.settings_broadcast.current_version().await;\n555\t        let query_body = serde_json::to_value(&body).unwrap_or(Value::Null);\n556\t        let fp = QueryFingerprint::new(effective_index.clone(), &query_body, settings_version);\n557\t\n558\t        match state.query_coalescer.register(fp.clone()).await {\n559\t            Ok(broadcast_tx) => {\n560\t                state.metrics.inc_query_coalesce_subscribers(1); // First subscriber = the query itself\n561\t                (Some(broadcast_tx), Some(fp))\n562\t            }\n563\t            Err(_) => {\n564\t                // Failed to register (too many pending queries) - proceed without coalescing\n565\t                debug!(\"too many pending queries, proceeding without coalescing registration\");\n566\t                (None, None)\n567\t            }\n568\t        }\n569\t    } else {\n570\t        (None, None)\n571\t    };\n572\t\n573\t    // Execute DFS query-then-fetch\n574\t    let mut result = dfs_query_then_fetch_search(\n575\t        plan,\n576\t        &client,\n577\t        search_req,\n578\t        &topo,\n579\t        policy,\n580\t        &strategy,\n581\t    )\n582\t    .await\n583\t    .map_err(|e| {\n584\t        tracing::error!(error = %e, \"search failed\");\n585\t        StatusCode::INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR\n586\t    })?;\n587\t\n588\t    // Drop topology lock before building response\n589\t    drop(topo);\n590\t\n591\t    // Strip internal fields from hits\n592\t    for hit in &mut result.hits {\n593\t        strip_internal_fields(hit, client_requested_score);\n594\t    }\n595\t\n596\t    // Build response body\n597\t    let response_body = serde_json::json!({\n598\t        \"hits\": result.hits,\n599\t        \"estimatedTotalHits\": result.estimated_total_hits,\n600\t        \"processingTimeMs\": result.processing_time_ms,\n601\t    });\n602\t\n603\t    // Only include facetDistribution if facets were requested\n604\t    let mut body = response_body.clone();\n605\t    if let Some(facets) = &result.facet_distribution {\n606\t        body[\"facetDistribution\"] = serde_json::to_value(facets).unwrap_or(Value::Null);\n607\t    }\n608\t\n609\t    // Broadcast result to coalesced queries (plan §13.10)\n610\t    if let (Some(broadcast_tx), Some(fp)) = (tx, fingerprint) {\n611\t        let response_bytes = serde_json::to_vec(&body).unwrap_or_default();\n612\t        let subscriber_count = broadcast_tx.receiver_count();\n613\t        if subscriber_count > 1 {\n614\t            // There are other queries waiting for this result - broadcast to them\n615\t            state.metrics.inc_query_coalesce_subscribers(subscriber_count as u64 - 1);\n616\t            let _ = broadcast_tx.send(response_bytes.clone());\n617\t            debug!(\n618\t                index = %effective_index,\n619\t                subscribers = subscriber_count - 1,\n620\t                \"broadcast search result to coalesced queries\"\n621\t            );\n622\t        }\n623\t        // Unregister the query after broadcasting\n624\t        state.query_coalescer.unregister(&fp).await;\n625\t    }\n626\t\n627\t    // Build response with optional headers\n628\t    let mut response = Response::builder()\n629\t        .status(StatusCode::OK)\n630\t        .header(\"content-type\", \"application/json\");\n631\t\n632\t    // Add X-Miroir-Settings-Inconsistent header if a broadcast is in flight (plan §13.5)\n633\t    if state.settings_broadcast.is_in_flight(&effective_index).await {\n634\t        response = response.header(\"X-Miroir-Settings-Inconsistent\", \"true\");\n635\t    }\n636\t\n637\t    // Add X-Miroir-Settings-Version header if we have a version for this index\n638\t    let current_version = state.settings_broadcast.current_version().await;\n639\t    if current_version > 0 {\n640\t        response = response.header(\"X-Miroir-Settings-Version\", current_version.to_string());\n641\t    }\n642\t\n643\t    if result.degraded {\n644\t        state.metrics.inc_scatter_partial_responses();\n645\t    }\n646\t\n647\t    if result.degraded && !result.failed_shards.is_empty() {\n648\t        let mut sorted_shards = result.failed_shards.clone();\n649\t        sorted_shards.sort();\n650\t        let shard_ids = sorted_shards.iter()\n651\t            .map(|id| id.to_string())\n652\t            .collect::<Vec<_>>()\n653\t            .join(\",\");\n654\t        response = response.header(\"X-Miroir-Degraded\", format!(\"shards={}\", shard_ids));\n655\t    } else if result.degraded {\n656\t        response = response.header(\"X-Miroir-Degraded\", \"partial\");\n657\t    }\n658\t\n659\t    let response = response\n660\t        .body(axum::body::Body::from(serde_json::to_string(&body).unwrap()))\n661\t        .unwrap();\n662\t\n663\t    // Structured log entry (plan §10 shape)\n664\t    // request_id and pod_id are included from the middleware span via\n665\t    // .with_current_span(true) on the JSON subscriber layer.\n666\t    tracing::info!(\n667\t        target: \"miroir.search\",\n668\t        index = %effective_index,\n669\t        duration_ms = start.elapsed().as_millis() as u64,\n670\t        node_count = node_count,\n671\t        estimated_hits = result.estimated_total_hits,\n672\t        degraded = result.degraded,\n673\t        \"search completed\"\n674\t    );\n675\t\n676\t    Ok(response)\n677\t}\n678\t\n679\t/// Search multiple target indexes (for multi-target aliases, plan §13.7, §13.11, §13.17).\n680\t///\n681\t/// Fans out the search to all target indexes and merges results by _rankingScore.\n682\t/// Used by ILM read_alias queries.\n683\tasync fn search_multi_targets(\n684\t    targets: Vec<String>,\n685\t    body: SearchRequestBody,\n686\t    state: Arc<AppState>,\n687\t    headers: HeaderMap,\n688\t    session_id: Option<String>,\n689\t    client_requested_score: bool,\n690\t) -> Result<Response, StatusCode> {\n691\t    let start = Instant::now();\n692\t\n693\t    // Extract session ID if provided\n694\t    let sid = session_id;\n695\t\n696\t    // Extract source IP from X-Forwarded-For or X-Real-IP (trust proxy)\n697\t    let source_ip = headers\n698\t        .get(\"x-forwarded-for\")\n699\t        .and_then(|v| v.to_str().ok())\n700\t        .and_then(|s| s.split(',').next())\n701\t        .or_else(|| headers.get(\"x-real-ip\").and_then(|v| v.to_str().ok()))\n702\t        .unwrap_or(\"unknown\")\n703\t        .trim()\n704\t        .to_string();\n705\t\n706\t    // Check rate limit for search UI (plan §4)\n707\t    let (limit, window_seconds) = match parse_rate_limit(&state.config.search_ui.rate_limit.per_ip) {\n708\t        Ok(parsed) => parsed,\n709\t        Err(e) => {\n710\t            warn!(error = %e, \"invalid search_ui.rate_limit.per_ip config, using default\");\n711\t            (60, 60) // Default: 60 requests per minute\n712\t        }\n713\t    };\n714\t\n715\t    let backend = state.config.search_ui.rate_limit.backend.as_str();\n716\t    if backend == \"redis\" {\n717\t        if let Some(ref redis) = state.redis_store {\n718\t            match redis.check_rate_limit_search_ui(&source_ip, limit, window_seconds) {\n719\t                Ok((allowed, _wait_seconds)) => {\n720\t                    if !allowed {\n721\t                        warn!(\n722\t                            source_ip_hash = hash_for_log(&source_ip),\n723\t                            \"search UI rate limited (redis)\"\n724\t                        );\n725\t                        return Err(StatusCode::TOO_MANY_REQUESTS);\n726\t                    }\n727\t                    // Allowed, proceed\n728\t                }\n729\t                Err(e) => {\n730\t                    warn!(error = %e, \"failed to check search UI rate limit\");\n731\t                    // Continue anyway on error (fail-open)\n732\t                }\n733\t            }\n734\t        }\n735\t    } else if backend == \"local\" {\n736\t        let (allowed, _wait_seconds) = state.local_search_ui_rate_limiter.check(\n737\t            &source_ip,\n738\t            limit,\n739\t            window_seconds * 1000,\n740\t        );\n741\t        if !allowed {\n742\t            warn!(\n743\t                source_ip_hash = hash_for_log(&source_ip),\n744\t                \"search UI rate limited (local backend)\"\n745\t            );\n746\t            return Err(StatusCode::TOO_MANY_REQUESTS);\n747\t        }\n748\t    }\n749\t\n750\t    // Session pinning logic (plan §13.6): Check if session has pending write\n751\t    let (pinned_group, _strategy_label) = if let Some(ref sid) = sid {\n752\t        if let Some(group) = state.session_manager.get_pinned_group(sid).await {\n753\t            // Session has a pending write - apply wait strategy\n754\t            let strategy = state.session_manager.wait_strategy();\n755\t            match strategy {\n756\t                WaitStrategy::Block => {\n757\t                    // Block until write completes or timeout\n758\t                    let max_wait = state.session_manager.max_wait_duration();\n759\t                    let wait_start = std::time::Instant::now();\n760\t                    match state.session_manager.wait_for_write_completion(\n761\t                        sid,\n762\t                        &state.task_registry,\n763\t                        max_wait,\n764\t                    ).await {\n765\t                        Ok(true) => {\n766\t                            // Write succeeded, clear pin and use normal routing\n767\t                            let wait_duration = wait_start.elapsed().as_secs_f64();\n768\t                            state.metrics.observe_session_wait_duration(wait_duration);\n769\t                            state.metrics.inc_session_pin_enforced(\"block\");\n770\t                            (None::<u32>, None::<u64>)\n771\t                        }\n772\t                        Ok(false) => {\n773\t                            // Write failed, clear pin\n774\t                            let wait_duration = wait_start.elapsed().as_secs_f64();\n775\t                            state.metrics.observe_session_wait_duration(wait_duration);\n776\t                            state.metrics.inc_session_wait_timeout(\"block\");\n777\t                            (None::<u32>, None::<u64>)\n778\t                        }\n779\t                        Err(_) => {\n780\t                            // Timeout - route to pinned group (best effort)\n781\t                            let wait_duration = wait_start.elapsed().as_secs_f64();\n782\t                            state.metrics.observe_session_wait_duration(wait_duration);\n783\t                            state.metrics.inc_session_wait_timeout(\"block\");\n784\t                            (Some(group), None::<u64>)\n785\t                        }\n786\t                    }\n787\t                }\n788\t                WaitStrategy::RoutePin => {\n789\t                    // Route to pinned group without waiting\n790\t                    state.metrics.inc_session_pin_enforced(\"route_pin\");\n791\t                    (Some(group), None::<u64>)\n792\t                }\n793\t            }\n794\t        } else {\n795\t            // No pending write - normal routing\n796\t            (None::<u32>, None::<u64>)\n797\t        }\n798\t    } else {\n799\t        // No session header - normal routing\n800\t        (None::<u32>, None::<u64>)\n801\t    };\n802\t\n803\t    // For multi-target aliases, we use the first target for settings/scoped key\n804\t    // All targets should have compatible settings (managed by ILM)\n805\t    let primary_target = targets.first().ok_or_else(|| {\n806\t        error!(\"multi-target alias has no targets\");\n807\t        StatusCode::INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR\n808\t    })?;\n809\t\n810\t    // Get the scoped key for the primary target\n811\t    let search_key = if let Some(ref redis) = state.redis_store {\n812\t        if let Ok(Some(sk)) = redis.get_search_ui_scoped_key(primary_target) {\n813\t            // Refresh scoped-key beacon\n814\t            let _ = redis.observe_search_ui_scoped_key(\n815\t                &state.pod_id,\n816\t                primary_target,\n817\t                sk.generation,\n818\t            );\n819\t            sk.primary_key\n820\t        } else {\n821\t            state.config.node_master_key.clone()\n822\t        }\n823\t    } else {\n824\t        state.config.node_master_key.clone()\n825\t    };\n826\t\n827\t    // Extract X-Miroir-Min-Settings-Version header\n828\t    let min_settings_version = headers\n829\t        .get(\"X-Miroir-Min-Settings-Version\")\n830\t        .and_then(|v| v.to_str().ok())\n831\t        .and_then(|s| s.parse::<u64>().ok());\n832\t\n833\t    // Use live topology from shared state\n834\t    let topo = state.topology.read().await;\n835\t    let policy = match state.config.scatter.unavailable_shard_policy.as_str() {\n836\t        \"partial\" => UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial,\n837\t        \"error\" => UnavailableShardPolicy::Error,\n838\t        \"fallback\" => UnavailableShardPolicy::Fallback,\n839\t        _ => return Err(StatusCode::INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR),\n840\t    };\n841\t\n842\t    // Plan scatter for primary target (for ILM read aliases, all targets\n843\t    // should have identical shard layout)\n844\t    let plan = {\n845\t        let _plan_span = tracing::info_span!(\n846\t            \"scatter_plan_multi_target\",\n847\t            primary_target = %primary_target,\n848\t            replica_groups = state.config.replica_groups,\n849\t            shards = state.config.shards,\n850\t            rf = state.config.replication_factor,\n851\t            min_settings_version,\n852\t            pinned_group = ?pinned_group,\n853\t            target_count = targets.len(),\n854\t        ).entered();\n855\t\n856\t        if let Some(group) = pinned_group {\n857\t            match plan_search_scatter_for_group(\n858\t                &topo,\n859\t                0,\n860\t                state.config.replication_factor as usize,\n861\t                state.config.shards,\n862\t                group,\n863\t            ) {\n864\t                Some(p) => p,\n865\t                None => {\n866\t                    warn!(\n867\t                        pinned_group = group,\n868\t                        \"pinned group unavailable, falling back to normal routing\"\n869\t                    );\n870\t                    plan_search_scatter(&topo, 0, state.config.replication_factor as usize, state.config.shards)\n871\t                }\n872\t            }\n873\t        } else if let Some(floor) = min_settings_version {\n874\t            let settings_broadcast = state.settings_broadcast.clone();\n875\t            let plan_result = plan_search_scatter_with_version_floor(\n876\t                &topo,\n877\t                0,\n878\t                state.config.replication_factor as usize,\n879\t                state.config.shards,\n880\t                primary_target,\n881\t                floor,\n882\t                &move |idx, node_id| {\n883\t                    let sb = settings_broadcast.clone();\n884\t                    let idx = idx.to_string();\n885\t                    let node_id = node_id.to_string();\n886\t                    tokio::task::block_in_place(|| {\n887\t                        tokio::runtime::Handle::current().block_on(async {\n888\t                            sb.node_version(&idx, &node_id).await\n889\t                        })\n890\t                    })\n891\t                },\n892\t            );\n893\t\n894\t            match plan_result {\n895\t                Some(p) => p,\n896\t                None => {\n897\t                    let err = MeilisearchError::new(\n898\t                        MiroirCode::SettingsVersionStale,\n899\t                        format!(\n900\t                            \"no covering set available for settings version floor {} on index '{}'\",\n901\t                            floor, primary_target\n902\t                        ),\n903\t                    );\n904\t                    return Err(StatusCode::SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE);\n905\t                }\n906\t            }\n907\t        } else {\n908\t            plan_search_scatter(&topo, 0, state.config.replication_factor as usize, state.config.shards)\n909\t        }\n910\t    };\n911\t    let node_count = plan.shard_to_node.len() as u64;\n912\t\n913\t    // Record scatter fan-out size\n914\t    state.metrics.record_scatter_fan_out(node_count);\n915\t\n916\t    // Build search request for primary target\n917\t    let search_req = SearchRequest {\n918\t        index_uid: primary_target.to_string(),\n919\t        query: body.q.clone(),\n920\t        offset: body.offset.unwrap_or(0),\n921\t        limit: body.limit.unwrap_or(20),\n922\t        filter: body.filter.clone(),\n923\t        facets: body.facets.clone(),\n924\t        ranking_score: client_requested_score,\n925\t        body: body.rest.clone(),\n926\t        global_idf: None,\n927\t    };\n928\t\n929\t    // Create node client\n930\t    let http_client = Arc::new(crate::client::HttpClient::new(\n931\t        search_key,\n932\t        state.config.scatter.node_timeout_ms,\n933\t    ));\n934\t    let client = ProxyNodeClient::new(http_client, state.metrics.clone());\n935\t\n936\t    // Use score-based merge strategy\n937\t    let strategy = ScoreMergeStrategy::new();\n938\t\n939\t    // Execute search\n940\t    let mut result = dfs_query_then_fetch_search(\n941\t        plan,\n942\t        &client,\n943\t        search_req,\n944\t        &topo,\n945\t        policy,\n946\t        &strategy,\n947\t    )\n948\t    .await\n949\t    .map_err(|e| {\n950\t        tracing::error!(error = %e, \"multi-target search failed\");\n951\t        StatusCode::INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR\n952\t    })?;\n953\t\n954\t    // Drop topology lock before building response\n955\t    drop(topo);\n956\t\n957\t    // Strip internal fields from hits\n958\t    for hit in &mut result.hits {\n959\t        strip_internal_fields(hit, client_requested_score);\n960\t    }\n961\t\n962\t    // Build response body\n963\t    let mut response_body = serde_json::json!({\n964\t        \"hits\": result.hits,\n965\t        \"estimatedTotalHits\": result.estimated_total_hits,\n966\t        \"processingTimeMs\": result.processing_time_ms,\n967\t    });\n968\t\n969\t    // Only include facetDistribution if facets were requested\n970\t    if let Some(facets) = &result.facet_distribution {\n971\t        response_body[\"facetDistribution\"] = serde_json::to_value(facets).unwrap_or(Value::Null);\n972\t    }\n973\t\n974\t    // Build response with optional headers\n975\t    let mut response = Response::builder()\n976\t        .status(StatusCode::OK)\n977\t        .header(\"content-type\", \"application/json\");\n978\t\n979\t    // Add settings headers\n980\t    if state.settings_broadcast.is_in_flight(primary_target).await {\n981\t        response = response.header(\"X-Miroir-Settings-Inconsistent\", \"true\");\n982\t    }\n983\t\n984\t    let current_version = state.settings_broadcast.current_version().await;\n985\t    if current_version > 0 {\n986\t        response = response.header(\"X-Miroir-Settings-Version\", current_version.to_string());\n987\t    }\n988\t\n989\t    if result.degraded {\n990\t        state.metrics.inc_scatter_partial_responses();\n991\t    }\n992\t\n993\t    if result.degraded && !result.failed_shards.is_empty() {\n994\t );\n1020\t\n1021\t    Ok(response)\n1022\t}\n1023\t\n1024\t/// Strip `_miroir_shard` from all hits (always).\n1025\t/// Strip `_rankingScore` unless the client explicitly requested it.\n1026\tpub fn }\n78\t        }\n79\t\n80\t        let avg_doc_length = if total_docs > 0 {\n81\t            total_length / total_docs as f64\n82\t        } else {\n83\t            0.0\n84\t        };\n85\t\n86\t        let n = total_docs as f64;\n87\t        let terms = term_df\n88\t            .into_iter()\n89\t            .map(|(term, df)| {\n90\t                let idf = if df == 0 {\n91\t                    0.0\n92\t                } else {\n93\t                    ((n - df as f64 + 0.5) / (df as f64 + 0.5)).ln() + 1.0\n94\t                };\n95\t                (term, GlobalTermStats { df, idf })\n96\t            })\n97\t            .collect();\n98\t\n99\t        Self { total_docs, avg_doc_length, terms }\n100\t    }\n101\t}\n102\t\n103\t// SearchRequest {\n341\t    /// Build the request body for sending to a node.\n342\t    ///\n343\t    /// Injects `showRankingScore: true` unconditionally so the merger can global-sort.\n344\t    /// Each node receives `offset + limit` results to ensure the coordinator has enough\n345\t    /// data to apply pagination.\n346\t    pub fn to_node_body(&self) -> Value {\n347\t        let mut body = self.body.clone();\n348\t\n349\t        // Inject showRankingScore: true unconditionally for global sorting\n350\t        body[\"showRankingScore\"] = serde_json::json!(true);\n351\t\n352\t        // serde_json::json!(self.offset + self.limit);\n355\t\n356\t        // Set offset to 0 on individual nodes (coordinator handles offset)\n357\t        body[\"offset\"] = serde_json::json!(0);\n358\t\n359\t        // Ensure query is set\n360\t        if let Some(q) = &self.query {\n361\t            body[\"q\"] = serde_json::json!(q);\n362\t        }\n363\t\n364\t set if provided\n370\t        if let Some(facets) = &self.facets {\n371\t            body[\"facets\"] = serde_json::json!(facets);\n372\t        }\n373\t\n374\t        body\n375\t    }\n376\t}\n377\t\n378\t#[derive(Debug)]\n379\tpub struct ScatterResult {\n380\t    pub shard_pages: Vec<ShardHitPage>,\n381\t    pub failed_shards: HashMap<u32, NodeError>,\n382\t    pub partial: bool,\n383\t    pub deadline_exceeded: bool,\n384\t}\n385\t\n386\t#[instrument(skip_all, fields(query_seq, rf, shard_count))]\n387\tpub async fn plan_search_scatter(\n388\t    topology: &Topology,\n389\t    query_seq: u64,\n390\t    rf: usize,\n391\t    shard_count: u32,\n392\t    replica_selector: Option<&ReplicaSelector>,\n393\t) -> ScatterPlan {\n394\t    let chosen_group =      }\n404\t    };\n405\t\n406\t    let _covering = covering_set(shard_count, group, rf, query_seq);\n407\t\n408\t    let mut shard_to_node = HashMap::new();\n409\t    for shard_id in 0..shard_count {\n410\t        let replicas = crate::router::assign_shard_in_group(shard_id, group.nodes(), rf);\n411\t\n412\t        let selected = if let Some(selector) = replica_selector {\n413\t            match selector.select(&replicas, chosen_group).await {\n414\t                Some(node) => node,\n415\t                None => replicas[(query_seq as usize) % replicas.len()].clone(),\n416\t            }\n417\t        } else {\n418\t            replicas[(query_seq as usize) % replicas.len()].clone()\n419\t        };\n420\t\n421\t        shard_to_node.insert(shard_id, selected);\n422\t    }\n423\t\n424\t    ScatterPlan {\n425\t        chosen_group,\n426\t        target_shards: (0..shard_count).collect(),\n427\t        shard_to_node,\n428\t        deadline_ms: 5000,\n429\t        hedging_eligible: group.node_count() > 1,\n430\t    }\n431\t}\n432\t\n433\t/// Plan search scatter with settings version floor filtering (plan §13.5).\n434\t///\n435\t/// Excludes nodes whose settings version for the given index is below `floor`.\n436\t/// Returns None if no covering set can be assembled (caller should return 503).\n437\tpub async fn plan_search_scatter_with_version_floor(\n438\t    topology: &Topology,\n439\t    query_seq: u64,\n440\t    rf: usize,\n441\t    shard_count: u32,\n442\t    index: &str,\n443\t    floor: u64,\n444\t    version_checker: &impl Fn(&str, &str) -> u64,\n445\t    replica_selector: Option<&ReplicaSelector>,\n446\t) -> Option<ScatterPlan> {\n447\t    let chosen_group = query_group(query_seq, topology.replica_group_count());\n448\t\n449\t    let group = topology.group(chosen_group)?;\n450\t\n451\t    let covering = covering_set_with_version_floor(\n452\t        shard_count,\n453\t        group,\n454\t        rf,\n455\t        query_seq,\n456\t        index,\n457\t        floor,\n458\t        version_checker,\n459\t    )?;\n460\t\n461\t    let mut shard_to_node = HashMap::new();\n462\t    for shard_id in 0..shard_count {\n463\t        let replicas = crate::router::assign_shard_in_group(shard_id, group.nodes(), rf);\n464\t        // Filter by version floor\n465\t        let eligible: Vec<_> = replicas\n466\t            .iter()\n467\t            .filter(|node_id| {\n468\t                let version = version_checker(index, node_id.as_str());\n469\t                version >= floor\n470\t            })\n471\t            .collect();\n472\t\n473\t        if eligible.is_empty() {\n474\t            return None;\n475\t        }\n476\t\n477\t        let selected = if let Some(selector) = replica_selector {\n478\t            // Convert Vec<&NodeId> to Vec<NodeId> for selector\n479\t            let eligible_owned: Vec<NodeId> = eligible.iter().map(|&n| n.clone()).collect();\n480\t            match selector.select(&eligible_owned, chosen_group).await {\n481\t                Some(node) => node,\n482\t                None => eligible[query_seq as usize % eligible.len()].clone(),\n483\t            }\n484\t        } else {\n485\t            eligible[query_seq as usize % eligible.len()].clone()\n486\t        };\n487\t\n488\t        shard_to_node.insert(shard_id, selected.clone());\n489\t    }\n490\t\n491\t    Some(ScatterPlan {\n492\t        chosen_group,\n493\t        target_shards: (0..shard_count).collect(),\n494\t        shard_to_node,\n495\t        deadline_ms: 5000,\n496\t        hedging_eligible: group.node_count() > 1,\n497\t    })\n498\t}\n499\t\n500\t/// Plan search scatter for a specific replica group (plan §13.6 session pinning).\n501\t///\n502\t/// Used when a session has a pending write and needs to read from the pinned group\n503\t/// to ensure read-your-writes consistency.\n504\tpub async fn plan_search_scatter_for_group(\n505\t    topology: &Topology,\n506\t    query_seq: u64,\n507\t    rf: usize,\n508\t    shard_count: u32,\n509\t    pinned_group: u32,\n510\t    replica_selector: Option<&ReplicaSelector>,\n511\t) -> Option<ScatterPlan> {\n512\t    let group = topology.group(pinned_group)?;\n513\t\n514\t    let mut shard_to_node = HashMap::new();\n515\t    for shard_id in 0..shard_count {\n516\t        let replicas = crate::router::assign_shard_in_group(shard_id, group.nodes(), rf);\n517\t        if replicas.is_empty() {\n518\t            continue;\n519\t        }\n520\t\n521\t        let selected = if let Some(selector) = replica_selector {\n522\t            match selector.select(&replicas, pinned_group).await {\n523\t                Some(node) => node,\n524\t                None => replicas[query_seq as usize % replicas.len()].clone(),\n525\t            }\n526\t        } else {\n527\t            replicas[query_seq as usize % replicas.len()].clone()\n528\t        };\n529\t\n530\t        shard_to_node.insert(shard_id, selected);\n531\t    }\n532\t\n533\t    Some(ScatterPlan {\n534\t        chosen_group: pinned_group,\n535\t        target_shards: (0..shard_count).collect(),\n536\t        shard_to_node,\n537\t        deadline_ms: 5000,\n538\t        hedging_eligible: group.node_count() > 1,\n539\t    })\n540\t}\n541\t\n542\t/// Plan search scatter using adaptive replica selection (plan §13.3).\n543\t///\n544\t/// Uses EWMA-based scoring to select the best replica for each shard,\n545\t/// falling back to round-robin for shards with no metrics data.\n546\t#[instrument(skip_all, fields(query_seq, rf, shard_count))]\n547\tpub async fn plan_search_scatter_adaptive(\n548\t    topology: &Topology,\n549\t    query_seq: u64,\n550\t    rf: usize,\n551\t    shard_count: u32,\n552\t    replica_selector: &ReplicaSelector,\n553\t) -> ScatterPlan {\n554\t    let chosen_group = query_group(query_seq, topology.replica_group_count());\n555\t\n556\t    let group = match topology.group(chosen_group) {\n557\t        Some(g) => g,\n558\t        None => {\n559\t            return ScatterPlan {\n560\t                chosen_group,\n561\t                target_shards: Vec::new(),\n562\t                shard_to_node: HashMap::new(),\n563\t                deadline_ms: 0,\n564\t                hedging_eligible: false,\n565\t            };\n566\t        }\n567\t    };\n568\t\n569\t    let mut shard_to_node = HashMap::new();\n570\t    for shard_id in 0..shard_count {\n571\t        let replicas = crate::router::assign_shard_in_group(shard_id, group.nodes(), rf);\n572\t        if replicas.is_empty() {\n573\t            continue;\n574\t        }\n575\t\n576\t        // Use adaptive selection to pick the best replica\n577\t        let selected = match replica_selector.select(&replicas, chosen_group).await {\n578\t            Some(node) => node,\n579\t            None => {\n580\t                // Fallback to round-robin if selector returns None\n581\t                replicas[(query_seq as usize) % replicas.len()].clone()\n582\t            }\n583\t        };\n584\t\n585\t        shard_to_node.insert(shard_id, selected);\n586\t    }\n587\t\n588\t    ScatterPlan {\n589\t        chosen_group,\n590\t        target_shards: (0..shard_count).collect(),\n591\t        shard_to_node,\n592\t        deadline_ms: 5000,\n593\t        hedging_eligible: group.node_count() > 1,\n594\t    }\n595\t}\n596\t\n597\t#[instrument(skip_all, fields(node_count))]\n598\tpub async fn execute_scatter<C: NodeClient>(\n599\t    plan: ScatterPlan,\n600\t    client: &C,\n601\t    req: SearchRequest,\n602\t    topology: &Topology,\n603\t    policy: UnavailableShardPolicy,\n604\t) -> Result<ScatterResult> {\n605\t    let mut node_to_shards: HashMap<NodeId, Vec<u32>> = HashMap::new();\n606\t    for (&shard_id, node_id) in &plan.shard_to_node {\n607\t        if plan.target_shards.contains(&shard_id) {\n608\t            node_to_shards.entry(node_id.clone()).or_default().push(shard_id);\n609\t        }\n610\t    }\n611\t    tracing::Span::current().record(\"node_count\", node_to_shards.len());\n612\t\n613\t    let mut shard_pages = Vec::new();\n614\t    let mut failed_shards = HashMap::new();\n615\t    let mut deadline_exceeded = false;\n616\t\n617\t    let mut tasks = Vec::new();\n618\t    for (node_id, shards) in node_to_shards {\n619\t        let node = match topology.node(&node_id) {\n620\t            Some(n) => n.clone(),\n621\t            None => {\n622\t                for shard_id in shards {\n623\t                    failed_shards.insert(shard_id, NodeError::NetworkError(\"node not in topology\".to_string()));\n624\t                }\n625\t                continue;\n626\t            }\n627\t        };\n628\t        let client_ref = client;\n629\t        let req_clone = req.clone();\n630\t        let node_id_clone = node_id.clone();\n631\t        let shard_count = shards.len();\n632\t        // Create a span for this node's scatter call\n633\t        let span = info_span!(\n634\t            \"scatter_node\",\n635\t            node_id = %node_id_clone,\n636\t            address = %node.address,\n637\t            shard_count = shard_count,\n638\t        );\n639\t        tasks.push(async move {\n640\t            let result = client_ref.search_node(&node_id_clone, &node.address, &req_clone).await;\n641\t            (node_id_clone, shards, result)\n642\t        }.instrument(span));\n643\t    }\n644\t\n645\t    let results = futures_util::future::join_all(tasks).await;\n646\t\n647\t    for (_node_id, shards, result) in results {\n648\t        match result {\n649\t            Ok(body) => {\n650\t                for _shard_id in shards {\n651\t                    shard_pages.push(ShardHitPage { body: body.clone() });\n652\t                }\n653\t            }\n654\t            Err(NodeError::Timeout) => {\n655\t                deadline_exceeded = true;\n656\t                for shard_id in shards { failed_shards.insert(shard_id, NodeError::Timeout); }\n657\t            }\n658\t            Err(e) => {\n659\t                for shard_id in shards { failed_shards.insert(shard_id, e.clone()); }\n660\t            }\n661\t        }\n662\t    }\n663\t\n664\t    let partial = !failed_shards.is_empty();\n665\t\n666\t    match policy {\n667\t        UnavailableShardPolicy::Error => {\n668\t            if !failed_shards.is_empty() {\n669\t                return Err(crate::error::MiroirError::Routing(format!(\"{} shard(s) unavailable\", failed_shards.len())));\n670\t            }\n671\t        }\n672\t        UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial => {}\n673\t        UnavailableShardPolicy::Fallback => {\n674\t            // Group-unavailability fallback: try other replica groups for failed shards\n675\t            if !failed_shards.is_empty() {\n676\t                let mut fallback_pages = Vec::new();\n677\t                let mut remaining_failed = HashMap::new();\n678\t\n679\t                for (&shard_id, error) in &failed_shards {\n680\t                    let mut fallback_succeeded = false;\n681\t\n682\t                    // Try each other replica group\n683\t                    for group_id in 0..topology.replica_group_count() {\n684\t                        if group_id == plan.chosen_group {\n685\t                            continue; // Skip the already-tried group\n686\t                        }\n687\t\n688\t                        if let Some(group) = topology.group(group_id) {\n689\t                            let replicas = crate::router::assign_shard_in_group(shard_id, group.nodes(), topology.rf());\n690\t                            if replicas.is_empty() {\n691\t                                continue;\n692\t                            }\n693\t\n694\t                            // Try each replica in the fallback group\n695\t                            for node_id in replicas {\n696\t                                if let Some(node) = topology.node(&node_id) {\n697\t                                    match client.search_node(&node_id, &node.address, &req).await {\n698\t                                        Ok(body) => {\n699\t                                            fallback_pages.push(ShardHitPage { body });\n700\t                                            fallback_succeeded = true;\n701\t                                            break;\n702\t                                        }\n703\t                                        Err(_) => {\n704\t                                            continue; // Try next replica\n705\t                                        }\n706\t                                    }\n707\t                                }\n708\t                            }\n709\t\n710\t                            if fallback_succeeded {\n711\t                                break; // Found a working replica\n712\t                            }\n713\t                        }\n714\t                    }\n715\t\n716\t                    if !fallback_succeeded {\n717\t                        remaining_failed.insert(shard_id, error.clone());\n718\t                    }\n719\t                }\n720\t\n721\t                // Merge fallback results\n722\t                shard_pages.extend(fallback_pages);\n723\t\n724\t                // Update failed_shards with only those that truly failed\n725\t                if remaining_failed.is_empty() {\n726\t                    // All shards succeeded via fallback\n727\t                    return Ok(ScatterResult {\n728\t                        shard_pages,\n729\t                        failed_shards: HashMap::new(),\n730\t                        partial: false,\n731\t                        deadline_exceeded,\n732\t                    });\n733\t                } else {\n734\t                    // Some shards still failed\n735\t                    failed_shards = remaining_failed;\n736\t                }\n737\t            }\n738\t        }\n739\t    }\n740\t\n741\t    Ok(ScatterResult { shard_pages, failed_shards, partial, deadline_exceeded })\n742\t}\n743\t\n744\t#[instrument(skip_all, fields(index = %req.index_uid))]\n745\tpub async fn scatter_gather_search<C: NodeClient>(\n746\t    plan: ScatterPlan,\n747\t    client: &C,\n748\t    req: SearchRequest,\n749\t    topology: &Topology,\n750\t    policy: UnavailableShardPolicy,\n751\t    strategy: &dyn MergeStrategy,\n752\t) -> Result<MergedSearchResult> {\n753\t    let scatter_result = execute_scatter(plan, client, req.clone(), topology, policy).await?;\n754\t\n755\t    let mut shard_pages = scatter_result.shard_pages;\n756\t    if scatter_result.partial {\n757\t        for shard_id in scatter_result.failed_shards.keys() {\n758\t            shard_pages.push(ShardHitPage {\n759\t                body: serde_json::json!({\"success\": false, \"message\": format!(\"shard {} unavailable\", shard_id)}),\n760\t            });\n761\t        }\n762\t    }\n763\t\n764\t    // Collect failed shard IDs for the X-Miroir-Degraded header\n765\t    let failed_shards: Vec<u32> = scatter_result.failed_shards.keys().copied().collect();\n766\t\n767\t    let merge_input = MergeInput {\n768\t        shard_hits: shard_pages,\n769\t        offset: req.offset,\n770\t        limit: req.limit,\n771\t        client_requested_score: req.ranking_score,\n772\t        facets: req.facets.clone(),\n773\t        failed_shards,\n774\t    };\n775\t\n776\t    // Span for the merge operation\n777\t    let _span = info_span!(\n778\t        \"merge\",\n779\t        shard_count = merge_input.shard_hits.len(),\n780\t        offset = req.offset,\n781\t        limit = req.limit,\n782\t    ).entered();\n783\t\n784\t    strategy.merge(merge_input)\n785\t}\n786\t\n787\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n788\t// OP#4: Global-IDF preflight execution\n789\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n790\t\n791\t/// Extract unique query terms from a search query string.\n792\tpub fn extract_query_terms(query: &Option<String>) -> Vec<String> {\n793\t    match query {\n794\t        Some(q) if !q.is_empty() => {\n795\t            let mut seen = std::collections::HashSet::new();\n796\t            let mut terms = Vec::new();\n797\t            for term in q.split_whitespace() {\n798\t                let lower = term.to_lowercase();\n799\t                if seen.insert(lower.clone()) { terms.push(lower); }\n800\t            }\n801\t            terms\n802\t        }\n803\t        _ => Vec::new(),\n804\t    }\n805\t}\n806\t\n807\t/// Execute the preflight phase: gather term frequencies from all shards.\n808\t#[instrument(skip_all, fields(node_count, term_count = req.terms.len()))]\n809\tpub async fn execute_preflight<C: NodeClient>(\n810\t    plan: &ScatterPlan,\n811\t    client: &C,\n812\t    req: &PreflightRequest,\n813\t    topology: &Topology,\n814\t) -> Result<GlobalIdf> {\n815\t    if req.terms.is_empty() {\n816\t        return Ok(GlobalIdf { total_docs: 0, avg_doc_length: 0.0, terms: HashMap::new() });\n817\t    }\n818\t\n819\t    let mut node_to_shards: HashMap<NodeId, Vec<u32>> = HashMap::new();\n820\t    for (&shard_id, node_id) in &plan.shard_to_node {\n821\t        if plan.target_shards.contains(&shard_id) {\n822\t            node_to_shards.entry(node_id.clone()).or_default().push(shard_id);\n823\t        }\n824\t    }\n825\t\n826\t    let mut tasks = Vec::new();\n827\t    for (node_id, _) in node_to_shards {\n828\t        let node = match topology.node(&node_id) {\n829\t            Some(n) => n.clone(),\n830\t            None => continue,\n831\t        };\n832\t        let client_ref = client;\n833\t        let req_clone = req.clone();\n834\t        let nid = node_id.clone();\n835\t        tasks.push(async move { client_ref.preflight_node(&nid, &node.address, &req_clone).await });\n836\t    }\n837\t\n838\t    let results = futures_util::future::join_all(tasks).await;\n839\t    let responses: Vec<PreflightResponse> = results.into_iter().filter_map(|r| r.ok()).collect();\n840\t    Ok(GlobalIdf::from_preflight_responses(&responses))\n841\t}\n842\t\n843\t/// Execute a full dfs_query_then_fetch search (OP#4 global-IDF preflight).\n844\t#[instrument(skip_all, fields(index = %req.index_uid))]\n845\tpub async fn dfs_query_then_fetch_search<C: NodeClient>(\n846\t    plan: ScatterPlan,\n847\t    client: &C,\n848\t    req: SearchRequest,\n849\t    topology: &Topology,\n850\t    policy: UnavailableShardPolicy,\n851\t    strategy: &dyn MergeStrategy,\n852\t) -> Result<MergedSearchResult> {\n853\t    let preflight_req = PreflightRequest {\n854\t        index_uid: req.index_uid.clone(),\n855\t        terms: extract_query_terms(&req.query),\n856\t        filter: req.filter.clone(),\n857\t    };\n858\t    let global_idf = execute_preflight(&plan, client, &preflight_req, topology).await?;\n859\t    let mut search_req = req;\n860\t    search_req.global_idf = Some(global_idf);\n861\t    scatter_gather_search(plan, client, search_req, topology, policy, strategy).await\n862\t}\n863\t\n864\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n865\t// Mock client\n866\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n867\t\n868\t#[derive(Debug, Clone, Default)]\n869\tpub struct MockNodeClient {\n870\t    pub responses:  }\n897\t\n898\t    async fn write_documents(\n899\t        &self, node: &NodeId, _address: &str, _request: &WriteRequest,\n900\t    ) -> std::result::Result<WriteResponse, NodeError> {\n901\t avg_doc_length: 60.0, term_stats: HashMap::from([(\"a\".into(), TermStats { df: 4500 })]) },\n1122\t        ];\n1123\t        let g = GlobalIdf::from_preflight_responses(&resp);\n1124\t        assert_eq!(g.total_docs, 100000);\n1125\t        assert!((g.avg_doc_length - 55.0).abs() < 0.001);\n1126\t        assert_eq!(g.terms.get(\"a\").unwrap().df, 9500);\n1127\t    }\n1128\t\n1129\t {\n1142\t            total_docs: 30000, avg_doc_length: 50.0,\n1143\t            term_stats: HashMap::from([(\"search\".into(), TermStats { df: 3000 })]),\n1144\t        });\n1145\t = make_test_topology();\n1162\t        let plan = plan_search_scatter(&topo, 0, 2, 64, None).await;\n1163\t        let mut c = MockNodeClient::default();\n1164\t        c.responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-0\".into()), serde_json::json!({\"hits\": [{\"id\": \"a\", \"_rankingScore\": 0.9}], \"estimatedTotalHits\": 1, \"processingTimeMs\": 5}));\n1165\t        c.preflight_responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-0\".into()), PreflightResponse {\n1166\t            total_docs: 50000, avg_doc_length: 50.0,\n1167\t            term_stats: HashMap::from([(\"test\".into(), TermStats { df: 500 })]),\n1168\t        });\n1169\t        let s = crate::merger::RrfStrategy::default_strategy();\n1170\t        let r = dfs_query_then_fetch_search(plan, &c, make_req(), &topo, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial, &s).await.unwrap();\n1171\t        assert!(!r.degraded);\n1172\t        assert!(!r.hits.is_empty());\n1173\t    }\n1174\t\n1175\t    /// Integration test for dfs_query_then_fetch with severely skewed shard distribution.\n1176\t    ///\n1177\t    /// This test simulates the scenario described in miroir-yio:\n1178\t    /// - Shard 0: Normal (1,000 docs, term df = 100)\n1179\t    /// - Shard 1: 100x normal (100,000 docs, term df = 10,000)\n1180\t    /// - Shard 2: Near-empty (10 docs, term df = 1)\n1181\t    ///\n1182\t    /// Without global IDF preflight, each shard would compute different local IDF values:\n1183\t    /// - Shard 0: IDF ≈ log((1000 - 100 + 0.5) / (100 + 0.5)) + 1 ≈ 2.3\n1184\t    /// - Shard 1: IDF ≈ log((100000 - 10000 + 0.5) / (10000 + 0.5)) + 1 ≈ 2.3\n1185\t    /// - Shard 2: IDF ≈ log((10 - 1 + 0.5) / (1 + 0.5)) + 1 ≈ 2.8\n1186\t    ///\n1187\t    /// With global IDF preflight, all shards use the same IDF:\n1188\t    /// - Global: N = 101,010, df = 10,101\n1189\t    /// - IDF ≈ log((101010 - 10101 + 0.5) / (10101 + 0.5)) + 1 ≈ 2.3\n1190\t    ///\n1191\t    /// This ensures scores are comparable across shards, enabling correct score-based merge.\n1192\t    #[tokio::test]\n1193\t    async fn test_dfs_skewed_shards_global_idf_aggregation() {\n1194\t        let mut topo = Topology::new(3, 1, 1);\n1195\t        topo.add_node(Node::new(NodeId::new(\"node-0\".into()), \"http://node-0:7700\".into(), 0));\n1196\t        topo.add_node(Node::new(NodeId::new(\"node-1\".into()), \"http://node-1:7700\".into(), 0));\n1197\t        topo.add_node(Node::new(NodeId::new(\"node-2\".into()), \"http://node-2:7700\".into(), 0));\n1198\t\n1199\t        let plan = plan_search_scatter(&topo, 0, 1, 3, None).await;\n1200\t\n1201\t        // Simulate severely skewed shard distribution\n1202\t        let mut c = MockNodeClient::default();\n1203\t\n1204\t        // Shard 0: Normal distribution\n1205\t        c.preflight_responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-0\".into()), PreflightResponse {\n1206\t            total_docs: 1000,\n1207\t            avg_doc_length: 50.0,\n1208\t            term_stats: HashMap::from([\n1209\t                (\"machine\".into(), TermStats { df: 100 }),\n1210\t                (\"learning\".into(), TermStats { df: 80 }),\n1211\t            ]),\n1212\t        });\n1213\t\n1214\t        // Shard 1: 100x normal (severely skewed)\n1215\t        c.preflight_responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-1\".into()), PreflightResponse {\n1216\t            total_docs: 100_000,\n1217\t            avg_doc_length: 55.0,\n1218\t            term_stats: HashMap::from([\n1219\t                (\"machine\".into(), TermStats { df: 10_000 }),\n1220\t                (\"learning\".into(), TermStats { df: 8_000 }),\n1221\t            ]),\n1222\t        });\n1223\t\n1224\t        // Shard 2: Near-empty\n1225\t        c.preflight_responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-2\".into()), PreflightResponse {\n1226\t            total_docs: 10,\n1227\t            avg_doc_length: 45.0,\n1228\t            term_stats: HashMap::from([\n1229\t                (\"machine\".into(), TermStats { df: 1 }),\n1230\t                (\"learning\".into(), TermStats { df: 1 }),\n1231\t            ]),\n1232\t        });\n1233\t\n1234\t        // Execute preflight to get global IDF\n1235\t        let preflight_req = PreflightRequest {\n1236\t            index_uid: \"test\".into(),\n1237\t            terms: vec![\"machine\".into(), \"learning\".into()],\n1238\t            filter: None,\n1239\t        };\n1240\t\n1241\t        let global_idf = execute_preflight(&plan, &c, &preflight_req, &topo).await.unwrap();\n1242\t\n1243\t        // Verify global aggregation\n1244\t        assert_eq!(global_idf.total_docs, 101_010);\n1245\t        assert_eq!(global_idf.terms.get(\"machine\").unwrap().df, 10_101);\n1246\t        assert_eq!(global_idf.terms.get(\"learning\").unwrap().df, 8_081);\n1247\t\n1248\t        // Verify global IDF is the same for all shards\n1249\t        // Expected IDF for \"machine\": log((101010 - 10101 + 0.5) / (10101 + 0.5)) + 1\n1250\t        let expected_idf_machine: f64 = ((101010.0_f64 - 10101.0 + 0.5) / (10101.0 + 0.5)).ln() + 1.0;\n1251\t        let actual_idf_machine = global_idf.terms.get(\"machine\").unwrap().idf;\n1252\t        assert!((actual_idf_machine - expected_idf_machine).abs() < 0.001);\n1253\t\n1254\t        // Expected IDF for \"learning\": log((101010 - 8081 + 0.5) / (8081 + 0.5)) + 1\n1255\t        let expected_idf_learning: f64 = ((101010.0_f64 - 8081.0 + 0.5) / (8081.0 + 0.5)).ln() + 1.0;\n1256\t        let actual_idf_learning = global_idf.terms.get(\"learning\").unwrap().idf;\n1257\t        assert!((actual_idf_learning - expected_idf_learning).abs() < 0.001);\n1258\t\n1259\t        // Verify that without global IDF, local IDF values would differ significantly\n1260\t        // Shard 0 local IDF for \"machine\": log((1000 - 100 + 0.5) / (100 + 0.5)) + 1 ≈ 3.19\n1261\t        // Shard 1 local IDF for \"machine\": log((100000 - 10000 + 0.5) / (10000 + 0.5)) + 1 ≈ 3.20\n1262\t        // Shard 2 local IDF for \"machine\": log((10 - 1 + 0.5) / (1 + 0.5)) + 1 ≈ 2.85\n1263\t        let local_idf_shard_0: f64 = ((1000.0_f64 - 100.0 + 0.5) / (100.0 + 0.5)).ln() + 1.0;\n1264\t        let local_idf_shard_2: f64 = ((10.0_f64 - 1.0 + 0.5) / (1.0 + 0.5)).ln() + 1.0;\n1265\t        assert!((local_idf_shard_2 - local_idf_shard_0).abs() > 0.2, \"Local IDF values should differ significantly\");\n1266\t        assert!((local_idf_shard_2 - actual_idf_machine).abs() > 0.3, \"Global IDF should be closer to large-shard local IDF\");\n1267\t    }\n1268\t\n1269\t    /// Test that DFS preflight handles empty query terms gracefully.\n1270\t    #[tokio::test]\n1271\t    async fn test_dfs_empty_query_terms() {\n1272\t        let topo = make_test_topology();\n1273\t        let plan = plan_search_scatter(&topo, 0, 2, 64, None).await;\n1274\t        let c = MockNodeClient::default();\n1275\t\n1276\t        let preflight_req = PreflightRequest {\n1277\t            index_uid: \"test\".into(),\n1278\t            terms: vec![],\n1279\t            filter: None,\n1280\t        };\n1281\t\n1282\t        let global_idf = execute_preflight(&plan, &c, &preflight_req, &topo).await.unwrap();\n1283\t        assert_eq!(global_idf.total_docs, 0);\n1284\t        assert!(global_idf.terms.is_empty());\n1285\t    }\n1286\t\n1287\t    /// Test that DFS preflight handles partial failures gracefully.\n1288\t    #[tokio::test]\n1289\t    async fn test_dfs_partial_failure() {\n1290\t        let mut topo = Topology::new(3, 1, 1);\n1291\t        topo.add_node(Node::new(NodeId::new(\"node-0\".into()), \"http://node-0:7700\".into(), 0));\n1292\t that to_node_body correctly injects showRankingScore: true and sets limit to offset + limit.\n1328\t    #[test]\n1329\t    fn test_to_node_body_injects_show_ranking_score() {\n1330\t        let req = SearchRequest {\n1331\t            index_uid: \"test\".into(),\n1332\t            query: Some(\"rust programming\".into()),\n1333\t            offset: 10,\n1334\t            limit: 20,\n1335\t            filter: Some(serde_json::json!(\"status = published\")),\n1336\t            facets: Some(vec![\"category\".into(), \"tags\".into()]),\n1337\t            ranking_score: false, // Client didn't request scores\n1338\t            body: serde_json::json!({\"custom\": \"field\"}),\n1339\t            global_idf: None,\n1340\t        };\n1341\t\n1342\t        let body = req.to_node_body();\n1343\t\n1344\t        // showRankingScore must be true unconditionally\n1345\t        assert_eq!(body.get(\"showRankingScore\"), Some(&serde_json::json!(true)));\n1346\t\n1347\t        // limit must be offset + limit (coordinator pagination)\n1348\t        assert_eq!(body.get(\"limit\"), Some(&serde_json::json!(30)));\n1349\t\n1350\t        // offset must be 0 (coordinator handles offset)\n1351\t        assert_eq!(body.get(\"offset\"), Some(&serde_json::json!(0)));\n1352\t\n1353\t        // query must be set\n1354\t        assert_eq!(body.get(\"q\"), Some(&serde_json::json!(\"rust programming\")));\n1355\t\n1356\t        // filter must be set\n1357\t        assert_eq!(body.get(\"filter\"), Some(&serde_json::json!(\"status = published\")));\n1358\t\n1359\t        // facets must be set\n1360\t        assert_eq!(body.get(\"facets\"), Some(&serde_json::json!([\"category\", \"tags\"])));\n1361\t\n1362\t        // custom body field must be preserved\n1363\t        assert_eq!(body.get(\"custom\"), Some(&serde_json::json!(\"field\")));\n1364\t    }\n1365\t\n1366\t    /// Test that to_node_body works with minimal request.\n1367\t    #[test]\n1368\t    fn test_to_node_body_minimal_request() {\n1369\t        let req = SearchRequest {\n1370\t            index_uid: \"test\".into(),\n1371\t            query: scores\n1377\t            body: serde_json::json!({}),\n1378\t            global_idf: None,\n1379\t        };\n1380\t\n1381\t        let body = req.to_node_body();\n1382\t\n1383\t        // Some(&serde_json::json!(0)));\n1391\t    }\n1392\t\n1393\t    /// Test that to_node_body handles large offset/limit correctly.\n1394\t    #[test]\n1395\t    fn test_to_node_body_pagination() {\n1396\t        let req = SearchRequest {\n1397\t            index_uid: \"test\".into(),\n1398\t            query: Some(\"test\".into()),\n1399\t            offset: 100,\n1400\t            limit: 50,\n1401\t            filter: None,\n1402\t            facets: None,\n1403\t            ranking_score: false,\n1404\t            body: serde_json::json!({}),\n1405\t            global_idf: None,\n1406\t        };\n1407\t\n1408\t        let body = req.to_node_body();\n1409\t\n1410\t        // limit must be offset + limit = 150 (fetch enough for coordinator pagination)\n1411\t        assert_eq!(body.get(\"limit\"), Some(&serde_json::json!(150)));\n1412\t\n1413\t        // offset must be 0 (coordinator handles offset)\n1414\t        assert_eq!(body.get(\"offset\"), Some(&serde_json::json!(0)));\n1415\t    }\n1416\t\n1417\t    /// Test group fallback when primary group has failed nodes.\n1418\t    #[tokio::test]\n1419\t    async fn test_group_fallback_on_partial_failure() {\n1420\t        let mut topo = Topology::new(16, 2, 2);\n1421\t        // Group 0: 2 nodes\n1422\t        topo.add_node(Node::new(NodeId::new(\"node-g0-0\".into()), \"http://g0-0:7700\".into(), 0));\n1423\t        topo.add_node(Node::new(NodeId::new(\"node-g0-1\".into()), \"http://g0-1:7700\".into(), 0));\n1424\t        // Group 1: 2 nodes (healthy fallback targets)\n1425\t        topo.add_node(Node::new(NodeId::new(\"node-g1-0\".into()), \"http://g1-0:7700\".into(), 1));\n1426\t        topo.add_node(Node::new(NodeId::new(\"node-g1-1\".into()), \"http://g1-1:7700\".into(), 1));\n1427\t\n1428\t        let plan = plan_search_scatter(&topo, 0, 2, 16, None).await; // query_seq=0 → group 0\n1429\t        assert_eq!(plan.chosen_group, 0);\n1430\t\n1431\t        let mut c = MockNodeClient::default();\n1432\t\n1433\t        // Set up responses: all shards on group 1 nodes return valid data\n1434\t        let response_1 = serde_json::json!({\n1435\t            \"hits\": [{\"id\": \"doc1\", \"_rankingScore\": 0.9}],\n1436\t            \"estimatedTotalHits\": 1,\n1437\t            \"processingTimeMs\": 5,\n1438\t        });\n1439\t        c.responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-g1-0\".into()), response_1.clone());\n1440\t        c.responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-g1-1\".into()), response_1);\n1441\t\n1442\t        // All nodes in group 0 fail\n1443\t        c.errors.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-g0-0\".into()), NodeError::Timeout);\n1444\t        c.errors.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-g1-0\".into()), NodeError::Timeout);\n1445\t\n1446\t        let req = make_req();\n1447\t\n1448\t        // With fallback policy,
